channel.description:
Any idea why is it 404? This is a new installation, And Wordpress is fully working. https://prnt.sc/viqzw4
Also
## System: - OS: macOS Mojave 10.14.6 - CPU: (12) x64 Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-8750H CPU @ 2.20GHz - Memory: 983.31 MB / 16.00 GB - Shell: 3.2.57 - /bin/bash ## Binaries: - Node: 14.15.0 - /usr/local/bin/node - npm: 6.14.8 - /usr/local/bin/npm ## Browsers: - Chrome: 86.0.4240.193 - Edge: Not Found - Firefox: Not Found - Safari: 14.0 ## npmPackages: - @frontity/core: ^1.9.1 => 1.9.1 - @frontity/html2react: ^1.5.0 => 1.5.0 - @frontity/mars-theme: ./packages/mars-theme => 1.4.4 - @frontity/tiny-router: ^1.2.3 => 1.2.3 - @frontity/wp-source: ^1.10.0 => 1.10.0 - frontity: ^1.13.0 => 1.13.0 ## npmGlobalPackages: - frontity: Not Found - npx: Not Found

item.dc:creator: emilylangley18
item.description:
Hi,
We are going to install Frontity on our idiom website. But we are a bit nervous and expecting to not have any errors like this.

Emily

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
@info5, it looks great! Congratulations

I encourage you to share your site in the Showcases category so the community can know about your site built with Frontity.

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: info5
item.description:
Ah OK That’s why! Thanks a lot. I am glad my blog is getting 95-100% en google speed test. https://blog.renzosalvador.com, still need some work like adding share icons, related posts, and the Yoast SEO information.

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @info5,

Glad you solve your issue.

We have recently released a change in Frontity that changes the way the REST API server url is configured

Make the backend URL a global setting Released
There are different options here to define the new source.url and I am not sure what is best: We can define it in the general settings, like frontity.url. We can define it in the source package, like the old source.api. Both of them will work, but we should reach an agreement to see how we document and explain it. If we take mars-theme as example, the initial frontity.settings.js would look like this: 1. Defining source.url in the general settings const settings = { name: "new-project", …

So, depending of how you set this url in your frontity.settings.js this may be the cause of that issue.

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: info5
item.description:
Thanks Juama, The installation is working now. Strange thing is that it is working with the URL without the"/wp-json", just the URL, I tried a couple of installations and it works the same, who can it be?

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @info5

Welcome to the Community!

Can you please provide a repo or code-sandbox with your code? This is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code

Read full topic

item.dc:creator: info5
item.description:

This is a new installation, And Wordpress is fully working.
